bio: I'm working on building something of my own where Machine Learning meets products that solve real problems and feel effortless to use. I care deeply about the details: how something looks, how it feels, how little it asks of the user. Good systems and **good design**, to me, are inseparable.

Most recently, I built WhiteBox, an AI system designed to act as a financial junior analyst, giving investors everything they need before making a decision: fundamentals, market data, sentiment, and news, all in real-time, orchestrated through specialized sub-agents. It placed 5th at Inter IIT Tech Meet 14.0. I also contributed to **GSoC** 2025 under ML4SCI, submitting a NeurIPS workshop paper as part of the work. As a Research Intern at **NUS**, I explored mechanistic interpretability in LLMs, proposing a novel gradient ascent based approach in sparse autoencoders to extract monosemantic features.

I'm a CSE undergraduate at IIT Dhanbad '27. In the long term, I aim to become an exceptional **ML engineer** and eventually build something of my own. If something meaningful is in the works, I'd love to connect.

projects.title: WhiteBox – AI junior analyst for equity market
projects.description: Agentic AI financial analyst that unifies news, filings, and sentiment into a shared memory, runs multi-agent debate to surface hidden contradictions, and delivers insights in ~90 seconds at ~3¢ (10× faster, 700× cheaper). Supports natural-language strategy input with instant backtesting on live market data.

projects.title: ISIC 2024 - Skin Cancer Detection
projects.description: Skin cancer detection from smartphone-quality lesion images. Fine-tuned DINOv2 on the ISIC 2024 dataset, handling class imbalance and optimizing for partial AUC.
